string 2:
One crisis subsides, only for another to emerge.
Peace just isn't in our future.

A devastatingly powerful Digimon is encroaching
from another world, it seems.

Otherwise the world itself may be in danger.
I'm afraid subduing it is the only option.

Honestly, immeasurably so. Not even I can imagine
what you'll be facing.

I understand, but while you rest, this world may perish.
Is that what you want?

You're the only one capable of handling this.
Still, I recommend you prepare fully first.

When you're ready, I'll make it so you can go there
from the Outer Dungeons as you please.
